Deft/Plff Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-02-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Karen S. Hull, Esq. 296-8700. Ms. Hull informed by the Court that this matter was heard yesterday. Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780.

Ntc Of Defts' Mtn For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alt For Summary Adjudication, Calendar Motion: Summary Judgment, Calendar Motion: Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Nov-01-2001 Unknown
MINI MINUTES: MOVING: Marc N. Bernstein 765-6633 for defendants AMOS BROWN and JANE BROWN moving for
summary judgment/summary adjudication
This matter was passed and recalled at 11:00 a.m. to allow opposing counsel to appear to argue.
At the second calling, no appearance by Plaintiff's counsel. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780

TENTATIVE RULING: Granted - no triable issue of fact exists violation of rent ordinance, fraud, negligent misrepresentation, burden of producing evidence and intentional or negligent infliction of emotional distress, i.e. Plaintiff's have changed residence with intent to reside there in good faith. Request for CCP ?437c(h) continuance denied. Defendant's to prepare order per CCP 437c(g). (SL)

STATUS CONFERENCE
MINI MINUTES: Orders to Show Cause to: Karen Hull, Esq., and to Matt Brown, Esq., re: failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8, are scheduled today. Order to Show Cause remained on Calendar as to Karen S. Hull only. There being no appearance plaintiff's counsel Karen Hull, Esq., is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)
